mapper.select: select model_name, purpose, count(*) as call_count, sum(prompt_tokens) as total_prompt_tokens, sum(completion_tokens) as total_completion_tokens, sum(estimated_cost) as total_estimated_cost from ai_token_usage where created_at between #{startTime} and #{endTime} and deleted = 0 group by model_name, purpose order by total_estimated_cost desc
select coalesce(sum(estimated_cost), 0) from ai_token_usage where created_at >= date_sub(now(), interval #{days} day) and deleted = 0
